author: Wzyss
install_msg: Thank you for installing Tickets! Set the panel channel and category with [p]ticketset, then use [p]ticketset panelembed to build the panel and [p]ticketset panel to send it.
name: Tickets
short: Button-based support tickets with embeds and management controls.
description: Ticket system with a customizable embed and button to create tickets. Dedicated channels per ticket, manager buttons (claim, close), auto-assign and inactivity auto-close, and transcript logging. No user-facing commands; creation is via the panel button only.
